Home / Services / Garage Door Installation

Garage Door Installation

Expert garage door installation services tailored to your Minneapolis home.

Choosing the right garage door is crucial for both curb appeal and security. At Paulson Garage Door LLC, we offer a wide selection of styles, materials, and colors to complement your Minneapolis home, from classic Craftsman designs to modern steel options. Our experienced technicians handle every aspect of the installation process, ensuring a perfect fit and smooth operation. We take into account the specific challenges of Minneapolis properties, including proper insulation for our extreme winters and durable construction to withstand freeze-thaw cycles. We work with leading brands to provide you with the highest quality products and warranties.

Our installation process includes removing your old door, preparing the opening, installing the new door and opener, and thoroughly testing the system for optimal performance. We also provide detailed instructions on how to maintain your new garage door to extend its lifespan. We ensure all safety features are properly installed and functioning.

Whether you're building a new home in Southwest Minneapolis or replacing an outdated door in Linden Hills, we'll guide you through the selection process and provide expert installation services to enhance the value and security of your property.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and selection of the perfect garage door for your needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise measurements and preparation of the garage door opening.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional installation of the garage door and opener system.
  4. 04 Step 4: Thorough testing and quality assurance to ensure smooth operation.

Benefits

  • Enhanced curb appeal
  • Increased home value
  • Improved security
  • Energy efficiency

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of garage door is best for Minneapolis winters?

Insulated steel garage doors are highly recommended for Minneapolis winters. They provide excellent insulation to keep your garage warm and reduce energy costs.

How long does a garage door installation typically take?

Most garage door installations can be completed in a single day, depending on the complexity of the project and the type of door being installed.

Do you offer warranties on your garage door installations?

Yes, we offer warranties on both the garage door itself and our installation services to provide you with peace of mind.

Get a Free Estimate
